dubai-marina.label: Dubai Marina
dubai-marina.propertyMix: Predominantly high-rise apartments (1BR to 4BR), some townhouses
dubai-marina.inspectionNote: Marina apartments typically have 4-6 rooms plus a balcony. Most inspections take 20 to 25 minutes including the kitchen, two bathrooms, and the balcony view documentation.
dubai-marina.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

downtown-dubai.label: Downtown Dubai
downtown-dubai.propertyMix: Luxury apartments and penthouses, branded residences (Address, Burj Vista)
downtown-dubai.inspectionNote: Downtown units often include premium finishes and integrated smart-home systems. Inspections take 25 to 35 minutes, particularly in branded residences where every fixture is documented.
downtown-dubai.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

business-bay.label: Business Bay
business-bay.inspectionNote: Business Bay studios and 1BR units are quick to inspect, typically 15 to 22 minutes. Many serviced apartments come furnished, requiring inventory documentation alongside condition reporting.
business-bay.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jlt.label: Jumeirah Lake Towers
jlt.inspectionNote: JLT towers vary widely in finish quality. Buildings completed before 2010 often need more thorough wear-and-tear documentation. Average inspection runs 18 to 25 minutes.
jlt.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jvc.label: Jumeirah Village Circle
jvc.inspectionNote: JVC properties range from compact studios to 4BR townhouses. Townhouse inspections take longer, typically 30 minutes including garden, garage, and exterior areas.
jvc.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jbr.label: Jumeirah Beach Residence
jbr.propertyMix: Beachfront apartments, 1BR to 4BR with sea views
jbr.inspectionNote: JBR units commonly come furnished or partially furnished. Inventory documentation alongside condition is standard. Inspections include balcony sea-view shots and beach-access amenities.
jbr.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

palm-jumeirah.label: Palm Jumeirah
palm-jumeirah.propertyMix: Luxury villas, signature villas, and apartments in trunk and frond developments
palm-jumeirah.inspectionNote: Palm Jumeirah villas are large, often with private pool and beach access. Inspections take 35 to 60 minutes including outdoor areas, pool equipment, and shoreline boundary documentation.
palm-jumeirah.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

arabian-ranches.label: Arabian Ranches
arabian-ranches.inspectionNote: Arabian Ranches villas have multiple bedrooms, gardens, and often a maid's room. Full inspections take 40 to 55 minutes including the garage, garden equipment, and external structures.
arabian-ranches.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-hills-estate.label: Dubai Hills Estate
dubai-hills-estate.propertyMix: Villas, townhouses, and apartments around the golf course
dubai-hills-estate.inspectionNote: Dubai Hills properties range from 1BR apartments to 6BR villas. Villas typically take 45 to 50 minutes; apartments around 25 minutes.
dubai-hills-estate.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

the-greens.label: The Greens
the-greens.propertyMix: Mid-rise apartments in landscaped gardens, 1BR and 2BR
the-greens.inspectionNote: The Greens apartments are well-maintained and consistent in finish. Most inspections take 18 to 24 minutes. Many units have private balconies overlooking the lakes.
the-greens.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

the-views.label: The Views
the-views.propertyMix: Apartments overlooking Emirates Golf Club, 1BR to 3BR
the-views.inspectionNote: The Views apartments come in waterside or golf-facing layouts. Premium units have larger balconies that need separate documentation. Inspections take 20 to 26 minutes.
the-views.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-silicon-oasis.label: Dubai Silicon Oasis
dubai-silicon-oasis.propertyMix: Affordable apartments and a few villa clusters
dubai-silicon-oasis.inspectionNote: DSO apartments are typically smaller in size and quick to inspect, around 15 to 22 minutes. Many tenants are tech professionals; documentation tends to be detailed and digital-first.
dubai-silicon-oasis.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

mirdif.label: Mirdif
mirdif.propertyMix: Villas and townhouses, established residential area, family-oriented
mirdif.inspectionNote: Mirdif villas are family homes, often with multiple bedrooms and large gardens. Inspections typically run 30 to 45 minutes including outdoor and garage spaces.
mirdif.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

discovery-gardens.label: Discovery Gardens
discovery-gardens.propertyMix: Mid-rise apartments, mostly studios and 1BR, themed garden clusters
discovery-gardens.inspectionNote: Discovery Gardens studios and 1BR apartments are compact and standardized. Inspections move quickly, around 12 to 20 minutes. The themed clusters share similar floor plans.
discovery-gardens.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-barsha.label: Al Barsha
al-barsha.propertyMix: Apartments and villas, established mixed-use area near Mall of the Emirates
al-barsha.inspectionNote: Al Barsha covers both apartment buildings and villa compounds. Apartments take 20 to 25 minutes; villas can extend to 35 to 40 minutes for larger family homes.
al-barsha.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

deira.label: Deira
deira.propertyMix: Older apartment buildings, traditional Dubai neighborhood, mostly 1BR and 2BR
deira.inspectionNote: Deira properties are in older buildings where wear-and-tear documentation is critical. Inspections take 18 to 25 minutes; particular attention to plumbing, AC age, and finish degradation.
deira.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jvt.label: Jumeirah Village Triangle
jvt.propertyMix: Townhouses and apartments, quieter than JVC
jvt.inspectionNote: JVT townhouses come in 2BR, 3BR, and 4BR layouts. Townhouse inspections include garage, small garden, and roof terrace. Average duration 30 to 40 minutes.
jvt.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-sports-city.label: Dubai Sports City
dubai-sports-city.propertyMix: Apartments and a few villa clusters around stadium and golf course
dubai-sports-city.inspectionNote: Sports City apartments are mostly 1BR and 2BR with views over sports facilities. Inspections take 18 to 25 minutes. Many units come unfurnished with standard finishes.
dubai-sports-city.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-production-city.label: Dubai Production City (IMPZ)
dubai-production-city.propertyMix: Affordable mid-rise apartments, mostly studios and 1BR
dubai-production-city.inspectionNote: IMPZ studios and 1BRs are compact, around 12 to 20 minutes per inspection. Standard finishes mean fewer differentiations between units.
dubai-production-city.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

motor-city.label: Motor City
motor-city.propertyMix: Apartments, townhouses, and a few villa clusters around Dubai Autodrome
motor-city.inspectionNote: Motor City has a mix of apartment buildings and townhouse clusters. Townhouses include private parking and small gardens, extending inspection time to 35 to 40 minutes.
motor-city.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

town-square-dubai.label: Town Square Dubai
town-square-dubai.propertyMix: Townhouses and apartments, family-oriented Nshama development
town-square-dubai.inspectionNote: Town Square is mostly Nshama-built townhouses with consistent layouts. 3BR and 4BR townhouses take 30 to 40 minutes; apartments around 22 to 25 minutes.
town-square-dubai.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

damac-hills.label: Damac Hills
damac-hills.propertyMix: Villas and apartments around Trump International Golf Club
damac-hills.inspectionNote: Damac Hills villas are 3BR to 5BR with private gardens. Inspections take 30 to 50 minutes including pool documentation where applicable.
damac-hills.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

damac-hills-2.label: Damac Hills 2
damac-hills-2.propertyMix: Townhouses in Akoya Oxygen, family-oriented community
damac-hills-2.inspectionNote: Damac Hills 2 is mostly 3BR townhouses in clusters. Standardized layouts mean inspections are predictable, 30 to 40 minutes including small garden and rooftop.
damac-hills-2.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubailand.label: Dubailand
dubailand.propertyMix: Mixed: townhouses, villas, and apartments across various sub-developments
dubailand.inspectionNote: Dubailand is a vast area; inspection time varies hugely by sub-development. Apartments 20 to 25 minutes, villas up to 50 minutes.
dubailand.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

the-springs.label: The Springs
the-springs.propertyMix: Townhouses (2BR, 3BR, 4BR) in landscaped community with lakes
the-springs.inspectionNote: The Springs townhouses have similar layouts across phases. 3BR townhouses (most common) take 30 to 40 minutes including front yard, back garden, and garage.
the-springs.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

the-meadows.label: The Meadows
the-meadows.propertyMix: Villas (3BR to 6BR) in family-oriented gated community
the-meadows.inspectionNote: The Meadows villas are spacious family homes with private pools in larger types. Inspections take 40 to 55 minutes including outdoor areas, pool equipment, and external structures.
the-meadows.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

emirates-hills.label: Emirates Hills
emirates-hills.propertyMix: Luxury custom villas, often called 'the Beverly Hills of Dubai'
emirates-hills.inspectionNote: Emirates Hills villas are large custom mansions, often 6BR+ with private pools, gyms, and home cinemas. Inspections require 60 to 90 minutes for full documentation.
emirates-hills.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jumeirah-park.label: Jumeirah Park
jumeirah-park.inspectionNote: Jumeirah Park villas are family homes with consistent layouts across districts. Standard inspection 40 to 55 minutes including garden, garage, and maid's room.
jumeirah-park.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jumeirah-islands.label: Jumeirah Islands
jumeirah-islands.inspectionNote: Jumeirah Islands villas come with private gardens and lake views. Inspections run 50 to 70 minutes including private dock or lake-edge documentation in some clusters.
jumeirah-islands.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-festival-city.label: Dubai Festival City
dubai-festival-city.propertyMix: Apartments and townhouses, mixed-use waterfront development
dubai-festival-city.inspectionNote: Dubai Festival City has both apartments and townhouses. Apartments take 22 to 28 minutes; townhouses extend to 35 to 40 minutes.
dubai-festival-city.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-creek-harbour.label: Dubai Creek Harbour
dubai-creek-harbour.propertyMix: New apartment towers along the creek, premium finishes
dubai-creek-harbour.inspectionNote: Creek Harbour is mostly new construction (post-2020). Premium finishes and modern fixtures mean detailed condition documentation. Inspections take 22 to 30 minutes.
dubai-creek-harbour.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

bluewaters-island.label: Bluewaters Island
bluewaters-island.propertyMix: Premium apartments and a few townhouses with sea views
bluewaters-island.inspectionNote: Bluewaters apartments are premium-finish with full sea views. Most inspections take 25 to 35 minutes, slightly longer for partly-furnished units that include inventory documentation.
bluewaters-island.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

city-walk.label: City Walk
city-walk.propertyMix: Premium apartments in pedestrian-friendly mixed-use development
city-walk.inspectionNote: City Walk apartments have premium urban finishes. Most are 1BR or 2BR, taking 22 to 30 minutes per inspection.
city-walk.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-furjan.label: Al Furjan
al-furjan.propertyMix: Apartments and townhouses, growing family community
al-furjan.inspectionNote: Al Furjan has a mix of apartment buildings and villa-style townhouses. Apartments 20 to 25 minutes; townhouses 35 to 40 minutes.
al-furjan.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

international-city.label: International City
international-city.propertyMix: Affordable studios and 1BR in country-themed clusters
international-city.inspectionNote: International City studios and 1BR units are compact and standardized. Inspections move quickly, typically 10 to 18 minutes.
international-city.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

mira.label: Mira (Reem)
mira.inspectionNote: Mira townhouses are part of Reem development. 3BR (most common) and 4BR layouts. Standard inspection 30 to 40 minutes including small garden and garage.
mira.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

tilal-al-ghaf.label: Tilal Al Ghaf
tilal-al-ghaf.propertyMix: Villas and townhouses in master-planned lagoon community
tilal-al-ghaf.inspectionNote: Tilal Al Ghaf is mostly new construction (post-2022). Premium villas with private gardens and pool access. Inspections take 35 to 60 minutes depending on size.
tilal-al-ghaf.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jumeirah-1.label: Jumeirah 1
jumeirah-1.propertyMix: Villas and apartments, beachfront luxury area
jumeirah-1.inspectionNote: Jumeirah 1 includes a mix of villas (40 to 50 min) and apartments (25 to 30 min). Premium beachfront villas can extend to 60 minutes.
jumeirah-1.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jumeirah-2.label: Jumeirah 2
jumeirah-2.inspectionNote: Jumeirah 2 is predominantly villas, 4BR to 6BR family homes. Inspections take 35 to 50 minutes including garden and garage.
jumeirah-2.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

jumeirah-3.label: Jumeirah 3
jumeirah-3.propertyMix: Villas, beachfront and inland residential area
jumeirah-3.inspectionNote: Jumeirah 3 villas include beachfront properties with private pool access. Larger villas extend inspection time to 55 minutes.
jumeirah-3.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

umm-suqeim.label: Umm Suqeim
umm-suqeim.propertyMix: Villas in family-oriented residential area near Burj Al Arab
umm-suqeim.inspectionNote: Umm Suqeim villas are spacious family homes, 4BR to 6BR. Inspections take 35 to 55 minutes including external structures.
umm-suqeim.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-wasl.label: Al Wasl
al-wasl.propertyMix: Mixed: villas, townhouses, and a few apartment buildings
al-wasl.inspectionNote: Al Wasl mixes apartment and villa properties. Apartments 25 to 30 minutes; villas 40 to 50 minutes.
al-wasl.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

satwa.label: Satwa
satwa.propertyMix: Older apartment buildings, traditional Dubai neighborhood
satwa.inspectionNote: Satwa apartments are typically older. Wear-and-tear documentation is critical. Inspections take 18 to 25 minutes with attention to plumbing and AC condition.
satwa.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-quoz.label: Al Quoz
al-quoz.propertyMix: Mostly industrial with limited residential, some staff accommodation
al-quoz.inspectionNote: Al Quoz residential units are limited. Studios and 1BR apartments dominate, 12 to 22 minutes per inspection.
al-quoz.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

bur-dubai.label: Bur Dubai
bur-dubai.propertyMix: Older apartment buildings, traditional historic Dubai area
sampleBuildings: Khalid Bin Al Waleed Road buildings
bur-dubai.inspectionNote: Bur Dubai apartments are typically older. Detailed condition documentation is essential. Inspections take 18 to 25 minutes.
bur-dubai.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

karama.label: Karama
karama.inspectionNote: Karama apartments are budget-friendly but require careful wear-and-tear documentation. 18 to 25 minutes per inspection.
karama.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-nahda.label: Al Nahda
al-nahda.propertyMix: Apartment buildings, established residential area near Sharjah border
al-nahda.inspectionNote: Al Nahda apartments are typically 1BR and 2BR. Inspections 18 to 25 minutes. Many tenants commute to Sharjah, so check-out timing flexibility is valued.
al-nahda.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-warqaa.label: Al Warqaa
al-warqaa.propertyMix: Villas and townhouses, family residential area
al-warqaa.inspectionNote: Al Warqaa villas are family homes, 3BR to 5BR. Inspections take 30 to 45 minutes including garden and garage.
al-warqaa.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

mizhar.label: Mizhar
mizhar.inspectionNote: Mizhar villas are family homes, typical inspection 30 to 45 minutes including outdoor and garage spaces.
mizhar.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

nad-al-sheba.label: Nad Al Sheba
nad-al-sheba.propertyMix: Villas in established residential area, family-oriented
nad-al-sheba.inspectionNote: Nad Al Sheba villas are spacious, 4BR to 5BR family homes. Inspections take 35 to 45 minutes.
nad-al-sheba.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

meydan.label: Meydan
meydan.propertyMix: Premium villas and apartments around Meydan Racecourse
meydan.inspectionNote: Meydan properties range from 1BR apartments to 6BR villas. Apartments 25 to 30 minutes; villas 40 to 50 minutes.
meydan.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

ras-al-khor.label: Ras Al Khor
ras-al-khor.propertyMix: Limited residential, mostly industrial; emerging waterfront developments
ras-al-khor.inspectionNote: Ras Al Khor residential units are mostly studios and 1BR. Inspections 18 to 28 minutes.
ras-al-khor.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

al-garhoud.label: Al Garhoud
al-garhoud.propertyMix: Older apartment buildings and a few villa clusters near airport
al-garhoud.inspectionNote: Al Garhoud apartments take 20 to 25 minutes; the few villas extend to 30 minutes. Older buildings need careful condition documentation.
al-garhoud.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

oud-metha.label: Oud Metha
oud-metha.inspectionNote: Oud Metha apartments are typically 1BR and 2BR. 20 to 28 minutes per inspection.
oud-metha.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

dubai-investment-park.label: Dubai Investment Park (DIP)
dubai-investment-park.propertyMix: Mixed-use; some residential apartments and townhouses, mostly industrial
dubai-investment-park.inspectionNote: DIP residential units are mostly 1BR apartments and small townhouses. 18 to 30 minutes per inspection.
dubai-investment-park.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

green-community.label: Green Community
green-community.propertyMix: Villas and townhouses, family-oriented gated community
green-community.inspectionNote: Green Community properties are family villas and townhouses, 30 to 45 minutes per inspection including garden and garage.
green-community.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

remraam.label: Remraam
remraam.propertyMix: Affordable apartments in family-oriented Dubailand sub-community
remraam.inspectionNote: Remraam apartments are studios, 1BR, and 2BR with consistent layouts. Inspections 15 to 22 minutes.
remraam.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

serena.label: Serena
serena.inspectionNote: Serena townhouses are 3BR Spanish-themed family homes. Standard inspection 28 to 40 minutes.
serena.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

the-lakes.label: The Lakes
the-lakes.propertyMix: Villas in established gated community next to Emirates Hills
the-lakes.inspectionNote: The Lakes villas are 3BR to 5BR family homes with private gardens. Inspections take 40 to 55 minutes.
the-lakes.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira

mudon.label: Mudon
mudon.propertyMix: Townhouses and villas around parks and cycle paths in Dubailand
mudon.inspectionNote: Mudon is mostly 3BR and 4BR townhouses with back gardens and shared park frontage. Inspections run 28 to 40 minutes for townhouses and up to 45 minutes for corner villas with larger outdoor areas.
mudon.rdcReference: Closest RDC: Dubai Land Department, Deira
